goal: Implement AchievementsFollowup.dc.html — compact Profile achievement REWARD section + achievement-unlocked popup; finish reward-vs-inventory split
done: Imported the Claude Design followup (DesignSync project 4189bce1: ProfileAchievementSection + AchievementUnlockedPopup). (1) NEW js/achievement-popup.js showAchievementUnlocked deck/badge variants: rays + confetti + coin-spin chip; deck=deck back + New-deck ribbon + View-in-Your-Decks/Awesome; badge=gold medallion + Awesome; .mt-au-* CSS. Wired into reading.js at the deck-unlock point (replaced old showDeckRewardPopup) so crossing a streak deck milestone fires the new popup. (2) Rewrote js/achievements-panel.js into the COMPACT reward section: header + See-all, '{u} of {t} rewards unlocked' bar, NEXT reward row (deck thumb + requirement + progress + +20 coin), recently-unlocked chip strip; See-all expands the full ladder inline with DONE rows crossed out. Rewards = 9 streak-deck milestones + 7 badges (16); Moonmallow excluded (inventory, not reward). .mt-ach-* CSS. (3) Removed the My Decks inventory grid from Profile (profile.js + profile.html/th) — Profile is now the reward board; deck inventory lives only on Your Decks (/decks.html). Cache-bust 20260622i -> 20260622j; www synced.
